positive: A stylized, minimalist silhouette of a group of diverse people—families, friends, and individuals of all ages and ethnicities—embracing joy and connection. The composition should feature dynamic, sweeping lines that create a sense of community and togetherness. Use a high-contrast, limited color palette (e.g., deep midnight blue and vibrant sunset orange) against a clean cream background. Focus on clean, solid forms with strong outlines, suitable for direct apparel printing. Style is graphic, vector art, modern, and joyful. Central composition, full-body representation of the group.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, poor details, cartoon, realistic, photograph
